recommendations.title: Review approval criteria for underperforming positions
recommendations.summary: 10 approved trade(s) are showing losses. Review whether confidence threshold or entry timing rules need adjustment.
recommendations.evidence: 10 position(s) with negative unrealized P&L after Risk Desk approval.
recommendations.expectedBenefit: Reduce false positive approvals and improve trade quality.
recommendations.recommendedAction: Review each underperforming position for common patterns (sector, timing, confidence).

recommendations.summary: 68 shadow trades tracked for rejected signals. Continue monitoring to build historical performance baseline.

recommendations.expectedBenefit: Build historical dataset to calibrate risk thresholds over time.
recommendations.recommendedAction: Run risk:learning each cycle to accumulate more shadow data.
